codeReview.summary: The rerun fixes the stacked-dialog scroll-lock bug by moving lock ownership into a shared window-backed singleton and only restoring body overflow when the final dialog releases its lock. The updated regression test now covers the previously failing sequence and matches the feature requirements.

summary: Reviewed the rerun for `fix-m1-dialog-scroll-lock`: inspected the feature metadata, prior partial handoff, worker transcript skeleton, `ui-worker` skill, commit `06595e2`, and the resulting `Dialog.vue` / `Dialog.test.ts` changes. The current implementation satisfies the required global reference-counted scroll lock behavior for stacked dialogs, and I found no remaining code issues or durable shared-state guidance gaps specific to this fix.
